# Attempted-password attack dictionary for the Honeypot Visualizer Dashboard.
# ADR-005 — only attempted passwords matching an entry here are surfaced
# verbatim on the public dashboard; non-matches are redacted to <filtered:len=N>.
#
# This file is GENERATED by build_dictionary.py from canonical attack-dictionary
# patterns (see the script's docstring for source-corpus references).
# Do not hand-edit; regenerate with `python build_dictionary.py > password_dictionary.txt`.
#
# Format: one literal password per line. Lines beginning with '#' are
# ignored. Whitespace is stripped. Entries are case-sensitive.
